hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && repo_root=$(realpath "$PWD") && target=$(realpath "$f") && case "$target" in "$repo_root"|"$repo_root"/*) npx --no-install prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$target" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

msg=$(jq -r '.userMessage'); if echo "$msg" | grep -qE '^/review'; then repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); echo "$msg" && echo "" && cat "$repo_root/docs/PR_REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md" 2>/dev/null; else echo "$msg"; fi | jq -Rs '{userMessage: .}'
